_comment: State file for the master-orchestrator continuous loop.

last_iteration.outcome: T20 fixed + committed (8e712d1). speculative_dispatch + local_llm moved from FULL to STANDARD tier. RAM threshold 16.0→15.0. Draft-first classifier now ENABLED on desktop. Also verified T9 mmproj fix is NOT regressed (confirmed preset.mmproj_file vs mmproj_source_file distinction is correct). Added house rule #11 (question original intent).

learned_patterns_applied: architect: mmproj_source_file for HF URLs, not mmproj_file
sre: speculative_dispatch requires NodeTierLevel.FULL but desktop reports STANDARD
house_rule_11: question original intent before changing code — read BOTH parallel paths
